title: distomos #1366
definition:
1) having a double mouth as a river
    1a) used of the edge of the sword and of other weapons,
        so has the meaning of two-edged
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) having a double mouth as a river
    1a) used of the edge of the sword and of other weapons,
        so has the meaning of two-edged

    NASB:  double-mouthed, two-edged:
